title: portulaca californica
intro: Portulaca californica, also known as California purslane, is a succulent perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Baja California. It is a member of the Portulacaceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and other essential nutrients, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. Portulaca californica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
